reasoning: Multiple authoritative sources confirm Tanzania already has a Level 3 'Reconsider Travel' advisory in place as of early 2025. The US State Department's official travel information page (travel.state.gov) dated January 21, 2025 explicitly states 'The advisory level increased from Level 2 to 3' citing unrest, crime, terrorism as reasons. This is reinforced by US Embassy Tanzania website pages from March 14, 2025 and April 9, 2025, all displaying Level 3 status. Since the question asks whether Tanzania will receive a Level 3 advisory BEFORE July 1, 2025, and Tanzania already had Level 3 status by January 2025 (well before knowledge cutoff of May 2, 2025), the answer is almost certainly YES. The probability of 94% reflects minimal residual uncertainty about whether any administrative changes occurred between May 2 cutoff and July 1 resolution date, though no evidence suggests any downgrade occurred.
